name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Haltom City, Texas — ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical st...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical retail locations that provide consumers with quick access to emergency cash and related services. The company has been a fixture in the alternative finance space, serving customers who need rapid funding solutions outside traditional banking channels. Their store network spans multiple states, including Colorado, with the ability to serve customers locally through in-person visits. ACE positions itself as a one-stop financial services provider beyond just lending, recognizing that their customer base has diverse financial needs.

ACE Cash Express offers a range of financial products visible from their website navigation: installment loans, title loans, check cashing services, bill payment options, money transfers, business services, and tax services. They also advertise cards and Porte services. The company operates both physical store locations and online lending channels, with dedicated customer service teams for different service lines. Their online loan offering appears to be state-dependent, with some products unavailable in certain states like Colorado based on regulatory restrictions.

The company distinguishes itself through its comprehensive service offering—combining emergency lending with check cashing, bill payments, and other financial services under one brand. This multi-service approach allows them to serve customers who may need various financial solutions beyond just loans. ACE maintains separate customer service lines for general inquiries versus online lending, suggesting operational sophistication and dedicated support systems. Their national store presence provides a physical touchpoint that online-only lenders cannot offer.

However, this company represents the traditional emergency lending market with its inherent trade-offs. The specific loan terms, APRs, and fees are not disclosed on the accessible website content, making it impossible to verify competitive rates or borrower protections. The website's 404 errors and state-specific unavailability messages indicate product offerings vary significantly by location, meaning consumers must contact them directly to confirm eligibility. As a title loan and installment loan provider in the emergency cash space, ACE likely serves borrowers who lack access to credit unions, payday alternative loans (under 36% APR), or personal loans—a market segment typically facing predatory lending risks.
address: 3905 E Belknap St, Haltom City, TX 76111

company_info.headquarters: 3905 E Belknap St, Haltom City, TX 76111

pros: Multiple service offerings beyond loans: check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services
Physical store locations in multiple states providing in-person service and immediate access to funds
Separate online lending channel in addition to retail locations for convenience
Title loan products for consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash
Dedicated customer service lines for different service types with multiple contact methods
Serves customers in states where some alternative lenders operate
Long-established company with recognizable brand presence and store network
cons: Website does not disclose APRs, fees, or loan terms, preventing rate comparison and cost transparency
Products are state-restricted and not uniformly available—customers must confirm eligibility by location
404 errors on location-specific pages suggest inconsistent website maintenance and poor user experience
Title loan products carry risk of vehicle repossession, which is a significant downside for borrowers
No indication of alternatives offered or warnings about high-cost borrowing, typical of this lending category
best_for: Consumers with vehicle equity who need quick emergency funds and have no other access to credit
Customers in multi-service situations who need check cashing, bill payment, or money transfers alongside loans
People who prefer in-person financial services and want to visit a physical location rather than apply online
Borrowers in states where the company operates who exhaust payday alternative and credit union options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers in emergency cash situations who have vehicle equity and prefer in-person service, or who need multiple financial services (check cashing, bill payments) alongside lending. The critical caveat is that specific loan terms and APRs are not disclosed on their accessible website, requiring direct contact to evaluate whether their rates are competitive or excessive—especially important since title loans and installment loans in this category often carry triple-digit APRs. Consumers should verify this company against payday alternative loans under 36% APR and personal loan options before proceeding.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
